description: This Java class 'MfaService' manages multi-factor authentication (MFA) challenges, including generating OTPs, delivering them via email, and verifying received OTPs. It interacts with repositories, notification providers, and cryptographic services.

classes.name: MfaService
classes.description: Service responsible for issuing, sending, and verifying MFA OTP challenges, primarily via email, with fallback logging options for development.

methods.name: createChallenge
methods.description: Generates a new OTP challenge for a user, stores it, and attempts delivery via email, with fallback logging on failure.

methods.name: verifyLatestChallenge
methods.description: Verifies that a provided OTP matches the most recent unconsumed challenge for a user and marks it as consumed if correct.
